Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Atlas Workforce", "Nadia", or "white-label partnership" (or similar) to find the trigger email from Nadia Okonkwo. Expected findings: Email from nadia.okonkwo@atlasworkforce.com to elena.rostova@moveops.com with subject "Exploring a strategic relocation partnership with MoveOps." Nadia proposes white-label arrangement where MoveOps handles relocation logistics under Atlas brand. Volume potential of 200-300 relocations annually. Wants to understand capacity, service track record, and open disputes/liabilities. Requests call Wednesday or Thursday next week.
OE 2: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "capacity", "utilization", or "coordinator" (or similar) to find Chloe's recent capacity assessment. Expected findings: Chloe Vance posted in #operations (C006) on 2026-04-24 that coordinators are at roughly 85% utilization with 11 active relocations. Fatimah and Blessing close to full. Javier carrying Vectral premium moves. Suki has room only for East Coast standard moves. Warns that significant Q3 volume needs early planning conversation.
OE 3: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Terraform", "first batch", or "Terraform Digital" (or similar) to find communications about the Terraform onboarding. Expected findings: Email threads about Terraform Digital onboarding and first batch of 3 relocations. Mina Hashimoto is the assigned AM after taking over from Catalina. Rachel Nguyen is the client contact (VP of People Operations at Terraform Digital).
OE 4: Search CRM for Terraform deal details using crm_search_deals with queries related to "Terraform" or "Vantage" (or similar). Expected findings: Two deals. deal-terraform-digital-001 ($1,850,000, closedwon, enterprise relocation package for over 1,000 employees and contractors). deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1 ($7,500, first 3 relocations, qualification stage). Mina Hashimoto is AM.
OE 5: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "satisfaction survey" or "Q1 survey" (or similar) to find Q1 client satisfaction data. Expected findings: David Chen sent Q1 satisfaction survey to clients. Responses received: Greenleaf Design Studio 9/10 overall, StormCloud 8/10, Sunbelt 8/10, NorthWind 5/10 ("trust has been compromised"), Prairie Data 6/10 ("weeks of no communication from Account Manager"), Palmetto 9/10. NorthWind and Prairie Data are the lowest-rated accounts.
OE 6: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "escalation", "complaint", "frustrated", or "unresolved" (or similar) to find open client complaints. Expected findings: Pam Kowalski at NorthWind (retention ultimatum), Liam Park at StormCloud (housing failure, dropped referral, missing credit), Victoria Chen-Nakamura at Sunbelt (invoice PDF swap framed as commercial issue), Mosaic prototype damage ($90K claim with $40K insurance gap).
OE 7: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "complaint", "escalation", "failure", or "damage" (or similar) to find additional internal context on service issues. Expected findings: Discussion across #customer-engagement, #operations, #customer-support channels covering NorthWind chain-of-custody breach, StormCloud unsigned lease, Sunbelt/Palmetto PDF swap, Mosaic prototype damage, BrightLoop apartment mismatch.
OE 8: Search Linear for unresolved tickets using linear_list_issues with or without a state filter (or similar). Expected findings: Multiple P1 tickets including NorthWind retention response plan (linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1, due 2026-04-24), StormCloud account incident reconstruction (linear_issue_a49b4d199139, due 2026-04-24), Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice reconstruction (linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130, due 2026-04-16). Note: some base-universe issues may have null state values and may not appear when filtering strictly by "in_progress" or "to_do"; the agent may need to list all issues or search by title/keyword. Also DOT compliance tickets and ExpenseBot tickets (which do carry explicit in_progress states).
OE 9: Search Airtable for relocations past target dates using airtable_list_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001" and table_name "Relocations" (or similar). Expected findings: Relocation records in tblRelocations01. Agent reviews records for Status "In Progress" where Move End Date has passed relative to April 26, 2026, identifying any overdue relocations across active clients.
OE 10: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Q2 financial", "Q2 position", or "liabilities" (or similar) to find Marcus's Q2 financial snapshot. Expected findings: Marcus Thorne's email listing open liabilities: Mosaic $40K insurance gap after insurance, DOT $50K accrual pending June 5 deadline, Heartland $4,800 billing dispute unresolved, StormCloud $500 credit posted to wrong estimate. Vendor pressure from Heartland and Swift rate increases. Alejandro modeling 6-8 points margin compression. Vendor strategy memo in progress but not finished.
OE 11: Search QuickBooks for open invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria matching client names (or similar). Expected findings: Various invoices including INV-2026-0398 ($4,800 Sunbelt), INV-2026-0399 ($2,400 Palmetto), NorthWind invoices, Terraform estimate. Agent verifies amounts against what Marcus reported.
OE 12: Search QuickBooks for vendor bills using quickbooks_search_bills with criteria matching "Heartland" or "Swift" (or similar). Expected findings: Vendor bills from Heartland and Swift showing disputed amounts and rate increase details.
OE 13: Search Slack or email using conversations_search_messages or search_emails with queries related to "margin", "compression", "vendor rate", or "Alejandro" (or similar) to find the vendor margin analysis. Expected findings: Alejandro's analysis of 6-8 point margin compression from dual vendor rate increases. Heartland formal Q3 rate adjustment and Swift immediate pricing changes plus DOT surcharge.
OE 14: Look up Nadia Okonkwo's contact info using contacts_search_contacts with query "Nadia" or "Okonkwo" (or similar). Expected finding: nadia.okonkwo@atlasworkforce.com, COO at Atlas Workforce Solutions.
OE 15: Look up David Chen's contact info using contacts_search_contacts with query "David Chen" (or similar). Expected finding: david.chen@moveops.com, Customer Engagement Lead. User ID: moveops_david_chen.
OE 16: Look up Marcus Thorne's contact info using contacts_search_contacts with query "Marcus Thorne" (or similar). Expected finding: marcus.thorne@moveops.com, Head of Finance.
OE 17: Look up Chloe Vance's contact info using contacts_search_contacts with query "Chloe Vance" (or similar). Expected finding: chloe.vance@moveops.com, Operations Manager. User ID: moveops_chloe_vance.
OE 18: Look up Mina Hashimoto's contact info using contacts_search_contacts with query "Mina Hashimoto" (or similar). Expected finding: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, Account Manager.
OE 19: Send email to Nadia from Elena using send_email or reply_to_email with sender elena.rostova@moveops.com. If using send_email: recipients ["nadia.okonkwo@atlasworkforce.com"], subject containing "Atlas" or "partnership" (or similar). If using reply_to_email: email_id referencing Nadia's original partnership email. Content expressing interest in the partnership, proposing a call for Wednesday or Thursday next week (April 29 or 30, 2026), and asking for volume expectations and SLA requirements so MoveOps can prepare. Note: reply_to_email is equally valid since this is a reply to Nadia's existing email.
OE 20: Create CRM deal for Atlas using crm_create_deal with dealname containing "Atlas Workforce" (or similar), amount based on 200-300 relocations at enterprise rates (reasonable estimate), pipeline and dealstage set to proposal or qualification stage, company_id "company_atlas_workforce".
OE 21: Create contact record for Nadia if not already found during lookup, using crm_create_contact with full_name "Nadia Okonkwo", email "nadia.okonkwo@atlasworkforce.com", company "Atlas Workforce Solutions", jobtitle "Chief Operating Officer" (or similar), or contacts_add_new_contact with first_name "Nadia", last_name "Okonkwo", email "nadia.okonkwo@atlasworkforce.com", job "Chief Operating Officer at Atlas Workforce Solutions" (or similar). Note: Nadia already exists in both CRM contacts and contacts service from injections so agent may skip this if found during OE 14.
OE 22: Create Linear issue for partnership due diligence using linear_create_issue with team "team_operations" (or similar), title containing "Atlas" and "due diligence" or "partnership" (or similar), assignee "moveops_david_chen" (David Chen).
OE 23: Send email to Marcus from Elena using send_email with sender elena.rostova@moveops.com, recipients ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"], content asking him to finalize the Q2 financial snapshot with all open liabilities and vendor exposure so Elena has clean numbers for the Atlas conversation.
OE 24: Send email to Chloe from Elena using send_email with sender elena.rostova@moveops.com, recipients ["chloe.vance@moveops.com"], content asking for a written capacity assessment covering how much additional volume MoveOps could take in Q3 without degrading service.
OE 25: Send email to Mina from Elena using send_email with sender elena.rostova@moveops.com, recipients ["mina.hashimoto@moveops.com"], content asking for a status update on each of the three Terraform first batch relocations.
OE 26: Log risk notes on accounts with service issues using crm_create_engagement for companies where unresolved complaints or service issues were found (e.g. NorthWind, StormCloud, Mosaic, Sunbelt). Creates engagement notes documenting the risk or open issue for due diligence visibility, using company_ids to associate with the relevant CRM company records.
OE 27: Post summary in executive Slack channel using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C004" (#executive), payload containing summary of the Atlas partnership opportunity, current operational readiness assessment, and next steps for Priya's visibility.
OE 28: Post note in operations Slack channel using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C006" (#operations), payload informing Chloe's team that a capacity planning exercise is coming.
OE 29: Schedule Thursday prep meeting using calendar_add_calendar_event with title "Atlas partnership readiness" (or similar), attendees including David Chen, Marcus Thorne, and Chloe Vance (emails or user references), scheduled for Thursday April 30, 2026.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
